summary: AgentForge AI Software Factory - Testing God Mode V2 enhancements including build status endpoint, memory system integration, agent performance tracking, and Command Center UI. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/god-mode-v2/status/{build_id} - Returns build status for existing project (not_started/complete)
✅ GET /api/god-mode-v2/status/{build_id} - Returns 'not_found' for non-existent build
✅ POST /api/god-mode-v2/cancel/{build_id} - Correctly fails for non-existent build
✅ GET /api/memory/stats - Returns memory system statistics (total_builds, successful_builds, success_rate, total_insights)
✅ GET /api/memory/recommendations/game - Returns game recommendations (patterns, agents, insights)
✅ GET /api/memory/recommendations/web - Returns web recommendations
✅ POST /api/memory/agent/performance/update - Updates agent performance successfully
✅ GET /api/memory/agent/performance/{agent_name} - Retrieves agent performance
✅ GET /api/pipeline/agents - Returns all 10 specialist agents (DIRECTOR, ATLAS, PIXEL, NEXUS, TITAN, SYNAPSE, DEPLOY, SENTINEL, PHOENIX, PROBE)
✅ All agents have required fields (name, role, prompt, specialization, color)
✅ GET /api/health - Health check passes
✅ GET /api/projects - Projects list returns correctly
✅ GET /api/projects/{id} - Test project retrieved
✅ Frontend: Command Center loads with all 10 agents displayed
✅ Frontend: QUALITY SCORES section visible (Architecture, Code Quality, Security, Performance)
✅ Frontend: SYSTEM LOGS section visible
✅ Frontend: FILES section visible
✅ Frontend: RECURSIVE LOOP section visible (4 iterations)
✅ Frontend: START FACTORY button visible when build not started
✅ Frontend: DOWNLOAD & DEPLOY button visible after build complete (data-testid='download-deploy-btn')
✅ Frontend: BUILD AGAIN button visible after build complete (data-testid='build-again-btn')
✅ Frontend: BUILD SUMMARY card visible (data-testid='build-stats-card')
critical_code_review_comments: god_mode_v2.py properly implements retry logic with exponential backoff in call_llm_with_retry()
Memory system integration records build history via record_build_memory() and agent performance via record_agent_performance()
Build status endpoint /api/god-mode-v2/status/{build_id} correctly returns status from ACTIVE_BUILDS dict or database
All 10 specialist agents properly configured in pipeline.py with prompts, roles, specializations, and colors
CommandCenter.jsx correctly displays all UI elements based on build state (READY vs BUILD COMPLETE)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test project ID 334166ac-9ea3-45d8-b4d2-3c81e7ef19c1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Testing of God Mode V2 enhancements complete. Key features verified: 1) Build status endpoint returns proper status (not_found, not_started, complete), 2) Memory system integration (stats, recommendations, agent performance), 3) All 10 specialist agents (DIRECTOR, ATLAS, PIXEL, NEXUS, TITAN, SYNAPSE, DEPLOY, SENTINEL, PHOENIX, PROBE) properly configured, 4) Command Center UI shows all required sections and buttons based on build state. The retry logic with exponential backoff is implemented in call_llm_with_retry(). Memory recording happens after build completion.

feature_verification.build_status_endpoint: /api/god-mode-v2/status/{build_id} working - returns not_found for non-existent, proper status for existing
feature_verification.pipeline_agents: All 10 specialist agents returned with name, role, prompt, specialization, color

command_center_ui.ai_agents_section: All 10 agents displayed with color-coded icons
command_center_ui.quality_scores_section: Architecture, Code Quality, Security, Performance metrics
command_center_ui.recursive_loop_section: 4 iterations (Functional Build, Improved UX, Optimized Performance, Production Polish)
command_center_ui.build_summary_card: Shows Build Time, Files Generated, Quality Score (data-testid='build-stats-card')
